strategy_justification: Direct HTTP GET to the Localised Product REST API (/api/product/s/{product_code}) returns full structured JSON with all product data including title, description, price, variants, images, availability, brand, and categories. No browser, no proxy, no session needed. Verified by live test — the API returned complete product data for 1165_5323_131. The site is a React SPA but the internal API is server-rendered and publicly accessible.
proxy_justification: Direct HTTP works with no proxy. The Product REST API has no anti-bot protection. No proxy escalation needed.

api_extraction.auth_note: API works without auth. Include basic auth (test:test) for safety but not required.
api_extraction.not_found_detection: Response body contains {"result": "NOT_FOUND"} with HTTP 200. MUST check body, not status code.
api_extraction.test_result: Full product JSON returned for 1165_5323_131 with name, price, variants, images, description, brand, availability, stock counts

title.test_result: AE Standard Fit Johnny Collar Knit Polo Shirt

price.note: Use priceRange.saleMin as alternative. Price is numeric (float), not a string. Format as A${price}.

original_price.note: Only set when sale=='ONSALE' AND listMin > saleMin. Check: if data['sale']=='ONSALE' and data['priceRange']['listMin'] > data['priceRange']['saleMin'] then original_price = priceRange.listMin. For this product, sale is NOSALE so original_price should be empty.

availability.note: Check ALL size variants across ALL color variants. If ANY is 'AVAILABLE' → 'In Stock'. If no AVAILABLE but some 'LOWSTOCK' → 'Low Stock'. If ALL 'OUTOFSTOCK' → 'Out of Stock'. For this product: some sizes LOWSTOCK (XS, S), others AVAILABLE (M, L, XL, XXL) → In Stock.

category.test_result: AE > Men > Tops > T shirts > Short sleeve t shirts
category.note: categoryPageIds is an array of human-readable breadcrumb strings. Use first element or join with ' > '.

description.test_result:
The polo shirt just got a major upgrade...

...
description.note: HTML string. Strip tags for plain text. Contains description, materials & care, size & fit sections.

images.note: Per-color variant. Collect large images from all color options, or only the selected color. 'standard' key also available for non-LARGE images.

sku.note: Product code from URL path. Also available as API response 'id' field.

color.note: From URL query parameter. Also available from API options[*].color.name.

variants_colors.note: Each option has color.name, color.id, color.swatch, availability, media, and nested options (sizes).

variants_sizes.note: Nested within each color option. Each size has size.name, size.slug, availability, stockQty, sku, price.

sale_status.note: Top-level field. Values: 'ONSALE' or 'NOSALE'. Use to determine if original_price should be populated.

price_formatting.note: Price from API is a float. Format with A$ prefix and 2 decimal places.

original_price_logic.note: Only populate original_price when there is an actual discount. When sale == 'NOSALE' or listMin == saleMin, leave original_price empty.

not_found_handling.note: Deleted/missing products return HTTP 200 with body {"result": "NOT_FOUND"}. MUST parse response body and check for this. Do NOT rely on HTTP status code alone.

fallback_strategy.fallback_note: If Product REST API fails (returns error, times out, or consistently 403), fall back to Playwright browser rendering with DOM extraction. Use CSS selectors: h1 for title, [data-testid='currentPrice'] for price, .Swatches__swatchSet for colors, .button--size-select for sizes, .ae-pdp-gallery img for images, .SectionLabel__section .HtmlText__htmlText for description.
fallback_strategy.fallback_wait: Wait 5000ms for SPA render + network idle

rate_limiting.justification: No anti-bot protection. CloudFront CDN with 5-second cache. Be respectful to avoid rate limits.
